title: vanilla pvp
description: vanilla minecraft textures but optimized for pvp & survival gameplay!
body:
ever wanted to have the best pvp or survival experience yet still wanted to have the **default textures** with you? this pack does exactly that! it has a few altered textures to optimize your pvp experience and improve survival gameplay yet still keep the **vanilla look and feel** of the game, maintained regularly!

## CUSTOM TEXTURES
- altered the **shield model** to have the **maximum visibility** of what's in front of you
- altered **block breaking** textures to be more fancy
- added custom **sky textures** (compatible with skyboxes mod)
- adjusted textures for **crystal pvp** (explosion, smoke and totems)
- reduced **fire height** significantly for better visibility
- altered **bedrock textures** to look cooler
- adjusted **font & gui appearance**
- fixed **carved pumpkin blur**, **vision through spyglass** and **fishing rod bobber** to be more visible
- made tripwire string **red** for better visibility
- removed **vignette** for better visibility
- new **splash texts**
- smaller **utils** (gapples, pearls, buckets, end crystal) & **food** items
- red diamond and netherites sword with **knockback**
- better cobwebs with outlines for easier **web bubbles**, epsecially for **UHC** and **lifesteal** :D
- added **borders** for ores to make them easier to spot
- made inventory GUI **transparent**
- added a texture for **powdered snow** to make them easier to spot 
- added textures for **infested stone variants** to make them stand out
- added red textures for **suspicious sand and gravel** to help exploring
- added **3D lanterns** to make them look better
- removed borders from **glass blocks**
- added blue textures for **nether wart** when fully grown for utility 
- added white flowers to the **full grown stage of crops** to make harvesting them easier!
- added **glass-bottom to boats** so the ocean is see-through while sailing
- made **trapped chests look red** so you know what's a trap
- made the **rain and snow textures** lighter for better visibility
- fixed the **big dripleaf stem** poking out when tilted
- added better **withered hearts textures** to make them more visible
- **axolotol variants** show up in the item texture
- **retextured glow lichen** to differentiate them from diamonds
- added **visual armmor trims** so you can see your trims right inside your hotbar
- added **indicators** to show whether **copper blocks are waxed** 

& much more!

& **nullerino**'s [Light Rain Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lighter-rain) for inspiration
